content.title: Winget Upgrade Helper (WUH)
content.short_description: Comprehensive package management suite for Windows.
content.description: A powerful PowerShell module that simplifies Windows package management using winget with an intuitive interface and advanced features. The tool provides a modular architecture with user-friendly menu system, batch operations, comprehensive logging, and support for multiple installer types. It streamlines the process of checking for updates, downloading packages, and managing software installations on Windows systems.
content.role: I designed and implemented a comprehensive PowerShell-based package management tool that enhances the Windows Package Manager (winget) experience. I created a modular architecture with 26 separate function files organized into logical categories (Logging, Helpers, PackageManagement, Menu), developed an interactive menu system with 11 different options, implemented support for multiple installer types (MSI, EXE, NSIS, Inno Setup, MSIX/APPX, ZIP), and built features like CSV import/export for batch operations, comprehensive logging with rotation, and automatic PowerShell 7 detection and execution.

achievements: Simplified package management workflow with a single `wuh` command
Reduced manual intervention in software updates through batch operations
Improved system maintenance efficiency with organized package storage
Enhanced user experience with color-coded console output and progress indicators
Streamlined offline package management for systems without internet access
technologies: Package installer type detection and handling

screenshots: Main interactive menu interface showing all 11 options
Package selection grid with interactive navigation
Installation progress indicators and status displays
Directory structure visualization of downloaded packages
Before/after comparison of package update process
